titleEn: Registration open for the 4th annual SWIPE
contentHtml: The 2027 Southwest Produce International Expo (SWIPE) will return to the JW Marriott Starr Pass in Tucson, AZ for networking, showcasing, and education on January 13-15, 2026. "SWIPE continues to grow not just in attendance but also in what it provides to attendees," says Lance Jungmeyer, FPAA president.…
